authors: Laura Jacobs Peter Van Aelst Department of Political Science
raw_title: Unmasking the Mechanism: How News Media Consumption Drives Conspiracy Beliefs
title_en: Unmasking the Mechanism: How News Media Consumption Drives Conspiracy Beliefs
title_zh: 揭示机制：新闻媒体消费如何驱动阴谋论信念
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了人们如何通过消费新闻媒体来形成或加强阴谋论信念。它试图揭示媒体内容如何影响人们对阴谋论的看法。
plain_summary_en: This research explores how people form or strengthen conspiracy beliefs through news media consumption. It aims to uncover how media content influences views on conspiracy theories.
research_direction_zh: 研究媒体消费与阴谋论信念之间的因果关系，关注媒体内容如何塑造公众对阴谋论的认知和态度。
research_direction_en: Investigating the causal relationship between media consumption and conspiracy beliefs, focusing on how media content shapes public perception and attitudes toward conspiracy theories.
